title: Department of Energy Issues Notice of Intent to Publish the 45Z Emissions Value Request Process
content: The U.S. Department of Energyâ€™s Office of Energy Efficiency and Renewable Energy is inviting public comments on a draft plan to establish provisional emissions rates (PER) for the 45Z clean fuel production credit. The agency plans to officially publish its notice of intent and request for comments in the Federal Register on July 24, with a prepublication version released on July 23.
author: Analysts Account
